creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, May 10, 2013 at 5:06 PM, Guido Falsi <madpilot@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi,
>
> I have two small changes I'd like you to approve:
>
>
> - Use DATADIR in plist
> - Remove share/applications directory if empty
>
> Patch attached.
>
> Thanks in advance.

They look fine. Tested in redports and my local system:

https://redports.org/~fernape/20130510172400-32844-118898/converseen-0.6.2.log
https://redports.org/~fernape/20130510172400-32844-118899/converseen-0.6.2.log

Thanks for the changes!

>
> --
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
